raw_resume_text:
Davon Shawn Meikle
Detroit, Michigan●(313)-484-7036

Davonsmeikle@gmail.com


QUALIFICATIONS SUMMARY
INTEGRITY | ACCOUNTABILITY | INSPIRATION

Reliable and motivated entry-level Help Desk and IT Support professional with hands-on technical certifications and strong background in customer service, troubleshooting, and documentation. Experienced in working directly with clients, resolving issues calmly under pressure, and following structured processes. Actively pursuing a career in IT with a long-term focus on cybersecurity.

SKILLS
EMPATHY
TEAMWORK
FLEXIBILITY
ACTIVE LISTENING
INTERPERSONAL SKILLS
COMMUNICATION SKILLS
MICROSOFT OFFICE SUITE
GOOGLE SUITE
MULTITASKING
CRITICAL THINKING
QUALITY ASSURANCE
CUSTOMER SATISFACTION
ATTENTION TO DETAIL
CONFLICT MANAGEMENT
CONFLICT RESOLUTION
LINUX
WIRESHARK

CERTIFICATIONS & EDUCATION
University Of Highschool – College Preparatory Diploma
Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) – University of Phoenix
Linux Fundamentals – University of Phoenix
Wireshark Network Analysis – University of Phoenix

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Operating Systems: Windows, Linux
Networking & Security: Wireshark, basic network troubleshooting
Tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office
Technical Support: Troubleshooting, documentation, escalation
Customer Support: Clear communication, issue resolution, professionalism

CORE STRENGTHS
Customer-focused
Calm under pressure
Fast learner
Strong documentation skills
Reliable and consistent
Troubleshooting mindset

Professional Experience

Porter – Pure Honda
Detroit, MI | 2023 – Present
Inspected, logged, and transported vehicles using internal systems
Verified accurate data entry and documentation
Communicated with sales, service, and management teams daily
Followed strict procedures to ensure safety, accuracy, and efficiency
Built strong attention to detail, time management, and accountability

In-Home Caregiver – Chrysalis
Las Vegas, NV | 2022 – 2023
Provided direct care and daily support to clients in residential settings
Maintained detailed digital and written documentation
Responded to real-time client needs with calm problem-solving
Followed healthcare protocols and privacy standards
Built strong communication, patience, and troubleshooting skills
